name: esp-tui
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libudev-dev binutils git cmake ninja-build python3-pip
postCreateCommand: cargo install espup ldproxy && espup install && rustup target add riscv32imc-unknown-none-elf riscv32imac-unknown-none-elf && rustup component add llvm-tools-preview
